title: eleocharis dichotoma
intro: Eleocharis dichotoma, also known as the two-angled spike rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis dichotoma include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Eleocharis dichotoma can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
